regions.text: Good weather. The day is bright. The air is warm. The sky is blue. They are happy.
Bad weather. The wind is blowing. The rain is falling. It is cold. It is wet. They are unhappy.
Bright is the opposite of dark. Warm is the opposite of cold.
White is the opposite of black. What is the opposite of dry? (See page 128.) What is the opposite of happy?
